select_when: Pursuing one objective necessarily weakens another, so the real decision is what good thing must be sacrificed, delayed, or downweighted.
Resource scarcity makes 'do everything' an illusion and the plan needs explicit prioritization instead of rhetorical balance.
Decision quality depends on naming the hidden cost of saying yes, including opportunity cost and displaced benefit.
The team is pretending there is no downside, no reallocation, or no ranking decision embedded in the recommendation.
avoid_when: Trade-off talk has become performance without allocation, so priorities are being acknowledged rhetorically but no resources, options, or rankings actually change.
The analysis is bloating into comprehensiveness theater instead of clarifying the few trade-offs that matter most.

curation_notes.summary: Focused the model on explicit sacrifice, allocation, and hidden-cost naming rather than on generic balance language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style optimization overlays because the raw source is stronger on prioritization, cost of yes, and anti-performative trade-off discipline.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch keeps Wave 4 observational only.
open_questions: The output type is reviewed compression over a source that mixes economic, communication, and strategic examples into one constraint-framing model.

select_when.note: The raw strengths section is explicit on necessary sacrifice, scarcity, and hidden costs; review mainly compresses that into routing-ready triggers.

avoid_when.note: The first anti-activation condition is explicit, and the second is a close operational compression of the comprehensiveness and analysis-paralysis warnings.

input_type.note: The raw source activates on constrained choices with conflicting goals, but the compact input label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The playbook produces explicit prioritization and cost-benefit framing; the output label compresses that into a typed artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Trade-offs clearly use systems and counterfactual reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
